data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple time slots per day for the tour. However, the evidence only confirms two specific time slots (10am and 2pm) without any indication of additional slots or flexibility in scheduling. This leads to a gap in meeting the requirement as it does not demonstrate that multiple time slots are available beyond the two mentioned.
gaps: Only two time slots (10am and 2pm) are provided, which does not satisfy the requirement for multiple time slots per day.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
